description: Logistic regression priors derived from Mount Sinai wearable IBD flare prediction study. Three prediction horizons: 7, 14, and 21 days.

features.label: HRV SDNN (normalized)
features.description: Standard deviation of NN intervals from cosinor-fitted wearable data

features.label: HRV MESOR (normalized)
features.description: Midline-estimating statistic of rhythm for HRV circadian cosinor fit

features.label: HRV Amplitude (normalized)
features.description: Circadian amplitude from cosinor model of HRV

features.label: Resting Heart Rate 7-day trend
features.description: Slope of resting HR over trailing 7 days relative to personal baseline

features.label: Steps deficit vs. personal baseline
features.description: Percent below 30-day rolling mean step count

features.label: Nocturnal SpO2 < 94% events
features.description: Count of overnight SpO2 dips below 94%, 7-day rolling

features.label: Symptom burden score (7d)
features.description: Weighted sum of logged symptom severity scores over trailing 7 days

features.label: Stool frequency trend
features.description: Change in daily bowel movement count vs. personal baseline
